'; var ROWS = ''; if (orders.length === 0) { ROWS += ''; } else { for (var j = 0; j < orders.length; j++) { var o = orders[j]; var dt = new Date(o.createdAt).toLocaleString('id-ID'); var cust = (o.customer || '-'); var sts = (o.status || '-'); var tot = rupiah(o.total || 0); ROWS += ''; } } ROWS += '
TanggalPelangganStatusTotal
Belum ada order
' + dt + '' + cust + '' + sts + '' + tot + '
'; w.document.open(); w.document.write(HEAD + SUMMARY + ROWS); w.document.close(); w.focus(); setTimeout(function() { w.print(); }, 500); } catch (err) { alert('Gagal generate laporan: ' + err.message); console.error('PDF error:', err); } }); if(localStorage.getItem(themeKey)==='dark'){document.body.classList.add('dark');document.getElementById('themeToggle').textContent='Mode Terang'} renderAll();
